v1.name: message
v1.title: message resource type
v1.description: Messages are email items in a mailbox.

properties.name: id

v1.name: user
v1.title: user resource type
v1.description: Represents a Microsoft Entra user account.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The unique identifier for the user.

properties.name: displayName
properties.description: The name displayed in the address book for the user.

relationships.name: memberOf
relationships.description: Groups, roles, and administrative units that the user is a member of.
